record.field: A 45-storey luxury residential tower with 350 units, retail podium, and world-class amenities including infinity pool, gym, and concierge services.

Expansion and widening of existing highway bridge to accommodate increased traffic volume. Works paused pending right-of-way land acquisition approval from the roads authority; structural reinforcement and new road alignment scope to resume once cleared.
Installation of 250 RC piles, 600mm diameter to design depth. Includes pile load testing.
Construction of 1200mm thick raft foundation including formwork, rebar, and concrete pour.
Structural Columns - Floors B2 to G
High tensile steel rebar. Delivery to site in 3 batches.
Pre-stressed girders to be delivered from factory with all certifications.
Supply, fabricate, deliver and erect structural steel works including main frame, secondary steel, and connections as per approved drawings.
Monthly progress claims against certified work. 10% retention released at practical completion.
Full MEP design and installation including HVAC, plumbing, firefighting, ELV, and BMS systems.
First running account bill covering piling works and early foundation works.
Piling Works - 250 nos RC Piles 600mm dia
All 250 piles completed to design depth. Load tests conducted and passed. All pile integrity tests satisfactory.
Rebar spacing requires adjustment at pile cap junctions. Minor corrective work required.
Adjust rebar spacing at pile caps per structural engineer instructions. Re-inspect before concrete pour.
Ongoing inspection of girder delivery and dimension verification.
Quarterly safety audit completed. All personal protective equipment in use. Fall protection systems in place.
Monthly rental for 2x tower cranes (Liebherr 280 EC-H). Includes operator and fuel.
Labour costs for specialized piling crew for Q1 2025 including overtime.
Site office establishment including containers, furniture, IT equipment, and utility connections.
Structural Steel Subcontract - Progress Payment to Date

First interim certificate paid against the structural steel subcontract, matching the contract's amount_paid to date. Billed progressively, not as a lump sum, since the steel works are still in early mobilization (see WBS Structural Works).
Specialized crane barge for river bridge girder lifting operations.
Bridge Crew Labour - Mobilization through Q2 2025
Cumulative direct labour costs for the bridge crew from mobilization through Q2 2025.
Pre-stressed Girders & Bridge Deck Concrete - Materials
Cumulative material costs for pre-stressed girders and bridge deck concrete through Q2 2025.
Waterproofing admixtures and retarders for raft foundation concrete.
Advance requisition for finishing stage. Awaiting WBS finishing kickoff.
MEP Rough-In Works - Levels B2 to L10
MEP containment, conduit and rough-in works ahead of fit-out, coordinated with the MEP subcontract.
RA Bill No. 2 - Raft Foundation Progress
Second running account bill covering completion of excavation and raft foundation progress. Lines are period-incremental (qty_current), so previous_billed stays 0 here, same as RA Bill No. 1.
Earned-value progress claim for Q2 2025, covering mobilization completion and early bridge structural works.
Marina Heights Business Tower - Commercial Office Complex

28-storey Grade-A commercial office tower. Now past its contractual completion date: the civil subcontractor was terminated mid-structure, a failed structural inspection has the system blocking all client billing until remediation is signed off, and remedial costs are accumulating with no matching revenue recognized - a live cash-flow risk a manual tracker would surface only after the damage is done.
Stalled after subcontractor termination and a failed concrete inspection on columns L8-L12. Re-tender for remaining structural scope in progress.
RC Structural Frame - Levels B2 to L28
Structural Columns - Levels L8 to L12
Cost overrun under active investigation: concrete cylinder tests failed on levels L8-L12, triggering remedial demolition and recast.
Cancelled following civil subcontractor termination. Scope to be re-tendered once structural remediation is signed off.
Corrective work order raised directly from the failed structural quality check. Quality clearance on this work order is the precondition for lifting the project-wide billing hold.
28-day cylinder strength results below design grade C40 on 6 of 9 sample sets. Visible honeycombing observed on column faces at L9 and L11.
Demolish and recast affected column sections per structural engineer's instruction. All client billing on this project is held until this check is re-inspected and passed.
Re-inspection scheduled following remedial recast. The original failed check remains on record and continues to block invoicing until formally closed.
Minor PPE non-compliance at the remedial works zone. Corrected on the same day.
Toolbox talk delivered; PPE compliance re-checked and confirmed within 24 hours.
Civil and structural concrete works for the full tower frame.
Terminated for performance default after the L8-L12 structural failure. Final account in dispute; no settlement invoice raised pending legal review.
Replacement reinforcement for the demolish-and-recast remedial scope.
RA Bill No. 1 - Structural Works (Quality Hold)

Drafted and approved internally, but cannot be invoiced: the system blocks invoice creation while a failed quality check is open on this project. Left in this state intentionally to demonstrate the billing gate.
RC Structural Frame - Levels B2 to L28
Civil Subcontract - Progress Payments to Date (Pre-Termination)
Cumulative progress payments made to the civil subcontractor before termination. Booked as cost even though the corresponding client billing is on hold.
Legal & Dispute Resolution Fees - Subcontractor Termination
Legal fees for termination notice, final account dispute, and contract claim defense.
Materials and direct labour for demolition and recast of the failed column sections.
Crane standby charges claimed during the work stoppage following termination.
Al Khail Industrial Zone, Dubai, UAE

Design-build logistics and warehousing facility. Delivered on schedule, on budget, with zero open non-conformances at handover - the benchmark project against which the troubled portfolio entries are compared on the dashboard.
Final handover inspection passed with zero defects and zero open non-conformances. Project closed out clean.
Supply, fabricate, deliver and erect structural steel frame and purlins for the warehouse envelope.
Paid in full at practical completion. Retention released after the defects liability period.
Final earned-value claim closing out the contract at 100% completion against prior billings to date.
Crane & Equipment Mobilization - Full Project Cycle
Cumulative crane and equipment mobilization/demobilization costs across the project lifecycle.
Cumulative direct labour costs from site mobilization through handover.
Steel & Cladding Materials - Full Project Cycle
Cumulative structural and envelope material costs across the project lifecycle.
Near Miss - Unsecured Scaffold Plank, Level 9
Loose scaffold plank found unsecured on Level 9 during routine walk-around. No injury occurred; area cordoned off immediately.
Plank re-secured and scaffold tag re-inspected. Toolbox talk delivered to the scaffolding crew on tagging procedure.
Weekly toolbox talk covering working-at-height procedures, harness inspection, and fall-arrest anchor points ahead of structural works mobilization.
Lost Time Injury - Hand Laceration During Formwork Strip
Worker sustained a hand laceration while stripping formwork on the remedial recast at columns L8-L12. Treated on-site then referred to clinic; one day lost.
Edge protection added to formwork panels. Crew re-briefed on PPE (cut-resistant gloves) compliance before resuming strip-out.
Method Statement - Raft Foundation Concrete Pour
NCR - Concrete Cylinder Test Failure Columns L8-L12
Issue of Foundation Drawings Rev 3 for Construction
Issued for construction following structural sign-off.
NCR Notification - Columns L8-L12 Concrete Failure
Formal notice of non-conformance requiring remedial action plan within 5 working days.
